title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
